transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you attending the research workshop tomorrow morning?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. I want to learn how to organize sources more efficiently for my term paper.

choices.text: To register for a new class.
